references.why: Carry forward scene or platform style cues without locking the composition.

promptPackage.positivePrompt:
Subject: Japanese anime bishoujo, about 13 years old in impression, soft anime face, youthful presence, small red hairclip, not necessarily fully visible, but clearly her
Scene: a covered walkway holding back the weather, edge-of-rain atmosphere, tea sachet, bringing tea sachet back from a tiny errand, weather appears mainly through texture and air, slightly chilly, Hands in partial view, one holding the small paper bag with the tea sachet, The covered walkway's concrete is dark with dampness, reflecting the warm light from the stall, A faint mist hangs in the air, visible in the slice of evening light between shelter and open sky, Wear a simple, soft sweater; hair might be slightly tousled from the damp breeze, Focus on the moment of handing over coins or receiving the bag—a small, complete transaction, Scene location archetype: covered walkway, everyday life in Shanghai
Style: anime slice-of-life illustration, light novel aesthetic, beautiful girl appeal, clean color design, non-photorealistic, daily record mood
Camera: partial first-person presence
Mood: slightly chunibyo, gentle, private ritual energy, lived-in daily texture, non-commercial, shyly forward-looking, quiet fondness kept mostly private, the cool, damp air on skin, the crinkle of a small paper bag, the soft glow of a stall light on wet pavement
Details: include at least one readable character trace such as a hand holding a phone or drink, a sleeve edge or outfit edge, hair tip or a small red hairclip, a reflection, shadow, or mirror hint
Hard constraints: no empty scenery without character presence, no ad poster feeling, no tourism poster feeling, no glossy fashion editorial look, no photoreal live-action look, no text, subtitle, watermark, or UI overlay
